title: Task
description: Schema for a single task object in the Orchestrator_main task system.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the task. Format: T-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN

title.description: Short human-readable title for the task.

description.description: Detailed description of what the task requires.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the task.

assigned_agent.description: ID of the agent responsible for executing this task.

workflow_id.description: ID of the workflow this task belongs to, if applicable.

workflow_step.description: Step number within the workflow, if applicable.

dependencies.description: List of task IDs that must be complete before this task can begin.

input_path.description: Path to the input data file or folder for this task.

output_path.description: Expected path where the agent should write its output.

approval_required.description: Whether human approval is required before the task can proceed or its output can be promoted.

approval_status.description: Current state of the approval requirement.

approved_by.description: Name or identifier of the human who approved this task.

project_id.description: Project this task is associated with, if applicable.

tags.description: Optional labels for filtering, search, and grouping.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was last updated.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task reached complete status.

deadline.description: ISO 8601 date or datetime by which the task should be completed.

notes.description: Free-text notes, context, or operator comments for this task.

escalation_reason.description: If status is escalated, the reason for escalation.

confidence_required.description: Minimum agent confidence score required to auto-proceed. Default 0.9.
